add.description: Add a new SA:MP/open.mp server to monitor
add.use_monitor_setup: Use `/monitor setup` to configure monitoring channels
add.use_server_activate: Use `/server activate` to switch monitoring to this server
add.security_details:
• Server validated and added to monitoring
• Rate limits: 12 queries/hour, 3 Discord servers max
• All queries are validated for security
add.error_rate_limit:
Rate limit exceeded for this IP address. Please try again later.

**Rate limits:**
• Maximum 12 queries per hour per IP
• Maximum 3 different Discord servers per IP
• Minimum 30 seconds between queries
add.error_invalid_ip:
Invalid or blocked IP address. Please use a valid public IPv4 address.

**Blocked ranges:**
• Private networks (10.x.x.x, 192.168.x.x, 172.16-31.x.x)
• Loopback (127.x.x.x) - only allowed in development
• Invalid ranges (0.x.x.x, 169.254.x.x, 224.x.x.x, 255.x.x.x)
add.error_connection_timeout: Connection timeout. The server may be offline or the address/port is incorrect.
add.error_connection_refused: Connection refused. The server may be offline or not accepting connections on this port.
add.error_not_found: Unable to resolve the server address. Please check the IP/domain name.
add.troubleshooting:
**Troubleshooting:**
• Verify the server IP address and port
• Ensure the server is online and accepting SA:MP queries
• Check if the server has query enabled
• Try again in a few moments

list.description: Show all configured servers for this guild
list.title: Configured Servers
list.no_servers_description: No servers have been added to this guild yet.
list.use_server_add: Use `/server add` to add your first server!
list.footer_no_active: No active server set - use /server activate to choose one

activate.description: Set which server to actively monitor

remove.description: Remove a server and all its data
remove.cancelled: Server deletion cancelled. Set confirm to `true` to proceed.
remove.success_description: Removed **{{name}}** and cleaned up all associated data
remove.cleanup_details:
• Chart data removed from database
• Uptime statistics removed
• All associated data cleaned up
• No orphaned data left behind

status.description: Show current server status and information
status.title: Server Status
status.cached_data: Cached data (use fresh:true for live data)
status.rate_limit_warning:
Fresh status requests are limited to prevent rate limits. Please wait {{seconds}} seconds.

💡 **Tip:** Regular status checks (without `fresh: true`) are unlimited and show recent data.

common.no_servers: No servers configured. Use `/server add` to add a server first.
common.server_not_found: Server not found. Use `/server list` to see available servers.
common.no_active_server: No active server set and multiple servers available. Use `/server activate` to set an active server, or specify which server to check.
common.an_error_occurred: An error occurred while {{action}}. Please try again.
